# Prerelease Gate — 2026-06-26

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-corekit

- Last release: v0.1.1
- Proposed target: v0.2.0 (bump: minor)
- Gate: pass

Bump rationale: a new public package (`vectorkit/turboquant`, conventional `feat`)
landed since v0.1.1. Under SemVer `0.y.z`, a new feature is a minor bump, so the
target is v0.2.0 — not the v0.1.2 milestone placeholder, which `07-gh-release`
will rename to v0.2.0.
